file_insights.changes: Added 10 new helper functions and comprehensive test coverage
file_insights.test_coverage: 8 test cases verifying path resolution, binary building, temp dir creation, card initialization, template structure, card creation, card finding, and cleanup

patterns_discovered.description: Nushell command execution uses `do { ^cmd } | complete` with exit_code checking
patterns_discovered.usage: All command invocations (cargo build, bop init, bop new) use this pattern

patterns_discovered.description: $env.CURRENT_FILE as root anchor, then path dirname operations to traverse up
patterns_discovered.usage: get_repo_root, get_adapter_path, get_bop_bin all derive from this

patterns_discovered.description: Card names may be prefixed with emoji glyphs; lookup requires suffix matching
patterns_discovered.usage: find_card_in checks exact match first, then searches for suffix matches

patterns_discovered.description: Windows compatibility requires backslash replacement in JSON paths
patterns_discovered.usage: write_providers escapes adapter path with str replace

gotchas_discovered.details: bop may prefix card IDs with glyphs, causing exact path lookup to fail. Implemented find_card_in to handle both exact and suffix-matching
build_bop runs full cargo build; no caching for repeated test runs. Consider checking binary existence first
mktemp creates real directory; cleanup must be called to avoid accumulation. No automatic cleanup on test failure
write_template uses fixed metadata values (stage: implement, empty acceptance_criteria). May need parameterization for varied test scenarios

approach_details.implementation_strategy: Bottom-up function composition with comprehensive test coverage
approach_details.test_validation: All 8 test cases pass, verifying path resolution, binary availability, directory structure creation, and cleanup
approach_details.code_quality: Proper error handling with descriptive error messages, consistent Nushell idioms, defensive path checking

recommendations.recommendation: Add conditional build logic to skip rebuild if binary exists
recommendations.rationale: Repeated test runs rebuild unnecessarily; check if get_bop_bin path exists before cargo build
Allow custom stage, provider_chain, and acceptance_criteria for varied test scenarios

recommendations.recommendation: Add optional persistent test data mode
recommendations.rationale: Allow tests to retain temp directories for debugging; add flag to disable cleanup
The find_card_in function's suffix-matching logic may confuse maintainers unfamiliar with bop's card naming scheme
